title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 9–11, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Chopper, Giants as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My dad is stronger than everyone else's!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Challenging me means only one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is my last chance... if I act now, the fires can be put out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the kids can be rescued, and Elbaf will be saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll have to be done in an instant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Colon, just give me one second!! Hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Just bear with the wounds for now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A life taken cannot be returned.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you for giving him life, Ripley...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is a treasure of a lifetime!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If I can't stop her here...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
